name: Orange Kiss-me Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind together the orange peel, raisins, and about 1/3 cup of walnuts using the coarse blade of a food chopper.
2. Sift the flour with 1 cup of sugar, baking soda, and salt into a large mixing bowl.
3. Add the shortening and milk to the dry ingredients. Blend well until no lumps remain.
4. Add the eggs and blend until smooth.
5. Stir in the fruit and nut mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch baking pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and drizzle with reserved orange juice.
9. Combine the remaining sugar, chopped walnuts, and cinnamon.
10. Sprinkle the mixture over the warm cake before serving.
